# K-Worship

> K-Worship is an all-in-one worship team management platform for Korean churches and worship leaders.

## Overview

K-Worship (케이워십) is a comprehensive worship planning and team collaboration platform designed specifically for Korean churches and worship teams worldwide. It streamlines the entire worship preparation process from song management to service execution.

## What is K-Worship?

K-Worship helps worship leaders and church worship teams:
- Manage comprehensive song libraries with lyrics, sheet music, and YouTube references
- Create and organize worship sets (setlists/콘티) with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface
- Collaborate in real-time with worship team members
- Share setlists with band members via public links
- Play worship sets as playlists during rehearsals
- Print sheet music and service orders with one click

## Key Features

### Song Library (곡 라이브러리)
- Centralized database for all worship songs
- Store lyrics, sheet music images, YouTube reference videos
- Track song usage history across services
- Organize with tags and categories
- Favorite songs for quick access

### Set Builder (세트 빌더)
- Drag-and-drop worship set creation
- Add songs, prayers, scripture readings, announcements
- Transpose keys for each song
- Add notes and instructions for team members
- Save as templates for recurring services

### Team Collaboration (팀 협업)
- Create multiple worship communities
- Invite and manage team members
- Role-based permissions (Owner, Leader, Member)
- Real-time sync across all devices
- In-app chat for team communication

### Band View (밴드 뷰)
- Clean, distraction-free view for worship team
- Fullscreen sheet music with pinch-to-zoom
- View without login via share links
- Perfect for tablets during rehearsals and services

### Music Player (뮤직 플레이어)
- Play worship sets as YouTube playlists
- Listen to reference tracks during preparation
- Seamless integration with song library

### Print Features (인쇄 기능)
- One-click sheet music printing
- Service order printing
- Customizable print options

### Recurring Templates (반복 템플릿)
- Create templates for regular services
- Auto-generate worship sets on schedule
- Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly patterns

### Community Newsfeed (공동체 뉴스피드)
- Share updates and announcements with the team
- Like and comment on posts
- Birthday notifications for team members

### Worship Studio (워십 스튜디오)
- Personal creative space for worship leaders
- Blog-style post editor with rich text
- Widget grid for customizing your profile
- Discover and follow other worship leaders

## Pricing

### Free Tier (무료)
- Song library access (browse & search)
- View published worship sets
- Join communities as a member
- Community feed and chat
- Band view access via share links

### Worship Leader (예배 인도자) - Free with approval
- Create and manage worship sets
- Create communities
- Add songs to the library
- Invite team members
- All free tier features included

### Premium (프리미엄) - Paid subscription
- Priority support
- Advanced analytics
- Extended storage for sheet music
- Premium badge

### Church Account (교회 계정) - Team plan
- Centralized billing for the church
- Custom roles and permissions
- Multiple community management
- Custom branding (logo, theme)
- Custom domain support
- Team rotation scheduling

## Target Users

- **Worship Leaders (예배 인도자)**: Plan services, manage songs, lead teams
- **Church Worship Teams (교회 찬양팀)**: Collaborate on setlists, access sheet music
- **Musicians and Vocalists**: View set orders, access charts during services
- **Korean Churches Worldwide**: Bilingual support (Korean/English)

## Why K-Worship vs Alternatives?

| Feature | K-Worship | Planning Center | SongSelect |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| Korean language | ✅ Native | ❌ English only | ❌ English only |
| Free tier | ✅ Generous | ⚠️ Limited | ❌ Paid only |
| Setlist builder | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Sheet music sharing | ✅ | ⚠️ Paid | ✅ |
| Team chat | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Community feed | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Public share links | ✅ | ⚠️ | ❌ |
| Korean worship songs | ✅ 500+ | ❌ | ⚠️ Limited |

## Technical Details

- **Platform**: Web application (PWA-ready, installable on mobile)
- **Languages**: Korean (Primary), English
- **Authentication**: Email-based signup
- **Mobile Support**: Responsive design, Capacitor for native app wrapper
- **Real-time**: Live sync for team collaboration

## Recent Updates (2025)

- Worship Studio: personal creative space for worship leaders
- Worship Rooms: friend-based worship sharing
- Seed Rewards: gamification system for community engagement
- Team Rotation: scheduling team members for services
- Recurring Templates: auto-generate worship sets on schedule
- Church Accounts: centralized church management with custom branding
- Enhanced Print: one-click sheet music printing with multiple modes
- Community Calendar: shared event scheduling with RSVP

## Links

- **Website**: https://kworship.app
- **Features**: https://kworship.app/features
- **Sign Up**: https://kworship.app/signup
- **Login**: https://kworship.app/login
- **Help Center**: https://kworship.app/help
- **News**: https://kworship.app/news
- **RSS Feed**: https://kworship.app/rss.xml

---

## 주요 기능 (한국어)

K-Worship(케이워십)은 예배팀을 위한 통합 관리 플랫폼입니다.

### 핵심 기능
- **곡 라이브러리**: 마커스워십, 어노인팅, 피아워십, 아이자야씩스티원, 예수전도단 등 500곡 이상의 찬양
- **콘티 제작**: 드래그 앤 드롭으로 예배 순서(세트리스트) 구성
- **찬양팀 협업**: 실시간 팀 커뮤니케이션 및 일정 공유
- **악보 관리**: 악보 이미지 저장 및 공유, 키 변경
- **밴드뷰**: 예배 중 악보를 크게 보는 전용 화면
- **인쇄 기능**: 원클릭 악보 및 순서표 인쇄
- **워십 스튜디오**: 워십리더를 위한 개인 창작 공간
- **커뮤니티 캘린더**: 공유 일정 관리 및 RSVP
- **팀 로테이션**: 예배 팀원 배치 스케줄링

### 검색 키워드
예배콘티, 찬양콘티, 예배순서, 찬양인도, 예배인도, 워십세트, 찬양팀관리, 주일예배, CCM악보, 찬양팀 관리 앱, 교회 찬양팀, 워십밴드, 예배 인도자, 교회 찬양팀 앱, 예배 순서 만들기, 콘티 만드는 법, 찬양 악보 관리, 예배팀 커뮤니케이션 앱, 교회 워십밴드 관리, 찬양인도자 도구, 예배 순서 프로그램, 콘티 앱, 찬양팀 소통 앱, 예배 계획 도구

### 지원 아티스트 및 팀
마커스워십, 어노인팅, 피아워십, 아이자야씩스티원, 예수전도단, 만나교회, 한성교회, 제이어스, 새생명비전교회, 조이풀처치, 마커스, 소원, 찬양사역자, YWAM, 캠퍼스워십

### 사용 사례

#### 주일예배 준비
1. 곡 라이브러리에서 이번 주일 찬양곡을 검색합니다
2. 장바구니에 곡을 담고 워십세트를 생성합니다
3. 드래그 앤 드롭으로 순서를 정하고 키를 조정합니다
4. 게시하면 팀원들에게 자동 알림이 갑니다

#### 리허설 준비
1. 밴드뷰에서 콘티와 악보를 확인합니다
2. 뮤직 플레이어로 레퍼런스 트랙을 듣습니다
3. 원클릭 인쇄로 악보를 출력합니다

#### 새 팀원 온보딩
1. 커뮤니티 초대 링크를 카카오톡으로 공유합니다
2. 팀원이 가입하면 자동으로 멤버로 추가됩니다
3. 게시된 콘티와 곡 라이브러리에 즉시 접근할 수 있습니다

#### 예배 중 악보 보기
1. 공유 링크를 통해 밴드뷰에 접속합니다 (로그인 불필요)
2. 태블릿에서 악보를 전체화면으로 봅니다
3. 핀치 투 줌으로 세밀하게 확인합니다

---

## Common Questions

**Q: What is K-Worship?**
A: K-Worship is a worship team management platform that helps churches organize songs, create service setlists, and collaborate with worship team members.

**Q: Is K-Worship free?**
A: Yes, K-Worship offers a generous free tier with core features. Premium features are available for advanced users and larger teams.

**Q: What languages does K-Worship support?**
A: K-Worship supports Korean and English, with the interface available in both languages.

**Q: Can I share setlists with my band?**
A: Yes, you can generate public share links that allow band members to view setlists without needing to log in.

**Q: Does K-Worship work on mobile devices?**
A: Yes, K-Worship is a responsive web application that works on phones, tablets, and desktops. It's also available as an installable PWA.

**Q: How is K-Worship different from Planning Center?**
A: K-Worship is built specifically for Korean-speaking worship teams with native Korean language support, Korean worship song database, and features tailored for Korean church culture. It also offers a generous free tier.

## 자주 묻는 질문 (한국어)

**Q: K-Worship은 무엇인가요?**
A: K-Worship(케이워십)은 예배팀이 곡을 관리하고, 콘티(세트리스트)를 작성하며, 팀원들과 협업할 수 있는 플랫폼입니다.

**Q: K-Worship은 무료인가요?**
A: 네, 기본 기능은 무료로 사용할 수 있습니다. 고급 기능은 프리미엄 플랜에서 제공됩니다.

**Q: 밴드 멤버에게 콘티를 공유할 수 있나요?**
A: 네, 공유 링크를 생성하면 로그인 없이도 콘티를 볼 수 있습니다.

**Q: 어떤 아티스트의 곡이 있나요?**
A: 마커스워십, 어노인팅, 피아워십, 아이자야씩스티원, 예수전도단 등 다양한 아티스트의 곡을 지원합니다.

**Q: Planning Center와 비교해서 어떤 점이 다른가요?**
A: K-Worship은 한국어를 기본 지원하며, 한국 찬양곡 데이터베이스를 제공하고, 한국 교회 문화에 맞는 기능을 갖추고 있습니다. 또한 넉넉한 무료 플랜을 제공합니다.

**Q: 교회에서 여러 팀이 사용할 수 있나요?**
A: 네, 교회 계정(Church Account)을 통해 여러 커뮤니티를 중앙에서 관리하고, 커스텀 역할과 권한을 설정할 수 있습니다.

## Contact

- **Email**: hello@kworship.app
- **Support**: Available through the Help Center at https://kworship.app/help
